title: clutia pterogona var. revoluta
intro: Clutia pterogona var. revoluta, also known as the velvet ball or velvet seed pod, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Clutia pterogona var. revoluta include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
